description: VA.gov is the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs web platform, including a developer portal that provides APIs for veteran benefits, facilities, forms, health, and verification use cases. These APIs are offered through the VA API Platform for third-party applications serving Veterans and related organizations.
summary: VA.gov exposes public REST APIs for forms and facilities plus credentialed REST APIs such as Benefits Intake and Veteran Confirmation; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
